_schema.description: Per-module dtype overrides keyed by model variant and mesh shape. Modules without an override use the model-wide default dtype (bfloat16). The model variant key is the basename of the model path; mesh shape is the worker grid (rows x cols, e.g. 1x2 / 1x8). Within a model, lookup tries the exact mesh-shape key first, then 'default'. Module keys: shared_mlp, attention, experts, router, lm_head, embedding. Allowed dtype values: bf16, bfp8, fp32.
